title: chionolaena durangensis
intro: Chionolaena durangensis, also known as Durango tree daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chionolaena durangensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Chionolaena durangensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
